kick.name: kick
kick.description: Kick a member from the server.
kick.errorNotInGuild: This command can only be used in a guild.
kick.errorNotFound: The specified user is not in this guild.
kick.errorNotKickable: I cannot kick this user. They might have higher permissions than me.
kick.errorKick: There was an error while trying to kick the member.

verify.name: verify
verify.description: Verify your account with your in-game name.

responses.success: ✅ {rsiName} has been verified with RSI for Discord member {username}!
responses.assignFailed: ❌ Could not assign the "Verified" role for Discord member {username} for RSI profile {rsiName}. Please try again.
responses.verificationFailed: ❌ Could not verify citizenship for Discord member {username} for RSI profile {rsiName}. Please try again.
responses.sessionExpired: ❌ Your verification session has expired. Please run /verify again to start a new session.
responses.invalidHandle: ❌ Please enter your RSI handle only (e.g. Testhandle123), not a full URL.
responses.nicknameFailed: ❌ Verification succeeded but your server nickname could not be updated. Please contact a server administrator.
responses.missingPermissionNickname: ⚠️ The bot is missing the **Manage Nicknames** permission. Please ask a server administrator to grant it.
responses.disabled: ❌ Verification is not available on this server.
responses.temporarilyUnavailable: ❌ Verification is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later or contact a server administrator.
responses.notConfigured: ❌ Verification is not configured for this server. Please contact an administrator.
responses.rateLimitMinute: ⏳ Please wait {seconds} second(s) before running /verify again.
responses.rateLimitHour: ⏳ You have reached the hourly /verify limit. Try again in {minutes} minute(s).

responses.adminOnly: Only server administrators can run this command.
responses.guildOnly: This command can only be used in a server.

execHangar.name: exec-hangar
execHangar.description: Check or manage the Executive Hangar timer.

status.description: Show the current Executive Hangar state.

sync.description: Manually set when the next Executive Hangar change will happen.

config.description: Configure the local Executive Hangar timer cycle.

responses.disabled: Executive Hangar tracking is not currently enabled.
responses.guildOnly: This command can only be used in a server.
responses.adminOnly: Only server administrators can run this command.
responses.temporarilyUnavailable: Executive Hangar tracking is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later or contact a server administrator.
responses.invalidAction: This command payload is out of date. Please run `/exec-hangar` again.
responses.uninitialized: Executive Hangar timing is not initialized yet. An administrator can run `/exec-hangar resync` or `/exec-hangar sync`.
responses.startupStale:
Warning: Timer has not been re-synced since bot startup.
An admin can run `/exec-hangar resync`.
responses.resyncFailed: Executive Hangar re-sync failed. Previous timer state was preserved.
responses.syncChoiceRequired: Provide exactly one of `opens-in` or `closes-in` when using `/exec-hangar sync`.
responses.invalidMinutes: Minutes must be a whole number greater than 0.
responses.configUpdated:
Executive Hangar configuration updated.
Open duration: {openDurationMinutes} min
Closed duration: {closedDurationMinutes} min
Cycle offset: {cycleOffsetMs} ms
responses.configFailed: Executive Hangar configuration could not be updated.

stationTimer.name: station-timer
stationTimer.description: Start, stop, or list your active station timers.

action.description: Choose whether to start, stop, or list timers.

type.description: Timer type to start. Defaults to CZ.

time.description: Timer duration in minutes. Defaults to 30.

id.description: Your active timer ID to stop.

responses.guildOnly: This command can only be used in a server.
responses.disabled: Station timers are not enabled right now.
responses.unavailable: Station timers are temporarily unavailable because database-backed storage is not configured.

start.invalidTime: Please provide a whole number between 1 and {maxMinutes} minutes.
start.userCapReached: You have already reached the maximum number of active station timers allowed for you in this server.
start.guildCapReached: This server has already reached the maximum number of active station timers allowed right now.
start.success:
Started a {durationMinutes}-minute {timerType} timer.
Timer ID: {timerId}
I will DM you when it expires.
If you are in a voice channel when it expires, I will also try to notify that voice channel's text chat.

list.none: You have no active station timers in this server.

stop.idRequired: You must provide a timer ID when using `/station-timer action:stop`.
stop.notFound: I could not find an active station timer with that ID for you in this server.

responses.guildOnly: This command can only be used in a server.
responses.adminOnly: Only server administrators can run this command.
responses.permissionsMissing: You are not authorized to run this nomination command.
responses.configurationError: Nomination features are not configured correctly right now. Please contact a server admin.
responses.unexpectedError: Something went wrong while handling this command. Please try again.

nominatePlayer.name: nominate-player
nominatePlayer.description: Nominate a Star Citizen player for recruitment outreach.

rsiHandle.name: rsi-handle
rsiHandle.description: The RSI handle of the player you are nominating.

responses.roleRequired: You must have the role {roleName} or higher to nominate players.
responses.invalidHandle: Please provide a valid RSI handle.
responses.created: Your nomination for {rsiHandle} has been logged. Every nomination is a meaningful step in growing and strengthening Dreadnought Industries — we appreciate your support. Fly safe o7
responses.submissionInProgress: Your previous nomination is still being processed. Please try again in a moment.
responses.cooldownActive: You must wait {formattedWait} before nominating again.
responses.targetDailyLimitReached: {rsiHandle} has already reached the maximum number of nominations in the last 24 hours.
responses.userDailyLimitReached: You have reached your daily nomination limit. Your limit resets in approximately {resetsIn}.
responses.citizenNotFound: That handle doesn't appear to belong to a valid Citizen in the 'Verse. Please check the name and try again.

myNominations.name: my-nominations
myNominations.description: See how many player nominations you've submitted over time.

responses.none: You haven't nominated any players yet.

nominationReview.name: nomination-review
nominationReview.description: Review unprocessed player nominations (up to 25; filter, sort, or adjust via options).

status.name: status
status.description: Filter by lifecycle state. Defaults to all non-processed.

sort.name: sort
sort.description: Sort order. Defaults to newest first.

limit.name: limit
limit.description: Maximum nominations to return (1–100). Defaults to 25.

detail.name: detail
detail.description: Show full technical breakdown (timeouts, rate limits, parse failures, etc.). Defaults to false.

responses.noneFiltered:
{filterContext}
No nominations match the current filter.
responses.configurationErrorWithFilterContext:
{filterContext}
Nomination features are not configured correctly right now. Please contact a server admin.
responses.unexpectedErrorWithFilterContext:
{filterContext}
Something went wrong while handling this command. Please try again.
responses.truncatedHint: — results may be truncated; increase the limit (up to 100) or narrow the filter to see more

nominationRefresh.name: nomination-refresh
nominationRefresh.description: Queue org membership status refresh for unprocessed nominations.

rsiHandle.name: rsi-handle
rsiHandle.description: Optional RSI handle to queue. Leave empty to queue all unprocessed nominations.

responses.invalidHandle: Please provide a valid RSI handle.
responses.none: There are no unprocessed nominations to queue.
responses.singleNotFound: Could not find an unprocessed nomination for {rsiHandle}.

nominationJobStatus.name: nomination-job-status
nominationJobStatus.description: Check status of nomination org-check background jobs.

jobId.name: job-id
jobId.description: Optional job ID. Leave empty to show the latest job.

responses.invalidJobId: Please provide a valid numeric job ID.

nominationProcess.name: nomination-process
nominationProcess.description: Mark one or all nominations as processed.

rsiHandle.name: rsi-handle
rsiHandle.description: Optional RSI handle to process. Leave empty to process all.

responses.singleNotFound: Could not find an unprocessed nomination for {rsiHandle}.
responses.singleNonQualifiedPrompt: **{displayHandle}** has lifecycle state **{lifecycleLabel}** and is not yet qualified. Process it anyway?
responses.singleProcessCancelled: Cancelled. {displayHandle} was not marked as processed.
responses.singleTimeout: Confirmation timed out. {displayHandle} was not processed.
responses.noneToProcess: There are no unprocessed nominations to process.
responses.confirmBulkPrompt: This will mark **{count}** unprocessed nomination(s) as processed. Are you sure?
responses.bulkTimeout: Confirmation timed out. No nominations were processed.

nominationAudit.name: nomination-audit
nominationAudit.description: View recent privileged nomination action audit events.

since.name: since
since.description: Show events after this time (ISO timestamp or shorthand like 1h, 24h, 7d).

limit.name: limit
limit.description: Max events to return (1–100). Defaults to 25.

responses.invalidSince: Invalid 'since' value. Use an ISO timestamp or shorthand like 1h, 24h, 7d.
responses.truncatedHint: — results may be truncated; narrow the filter or increase the limit

nominationAccess.name: nomination-access
nominationAccess.description: Configure non-admin roles allowed to review/process nominations.

action.name: action
action.description: add, remove, list, or reset access roles

role.name: role
role.description: Role to add/remove from nomination review/process access

responses.roleRequired: You must provide a role for add/remove actions.
responses.added: Role {roleMention} add request processed (changed: {changed}). Current allowed roles: {roles}.
responses.removed: Role {roleMention} remove request processed (changed: {changed}). Current allowed roles: {roles}.
responses.resetNoRoles: No custom roles are configured. Nothing to reset.
responses.resetConfirmPrompt: This will remove access for **{count}** role(s): {roles}. Only admins will retain access. Are you sure?
responses.resetCancelled: Reset cancelled. No changes were made.
responses.resetTimeout: Confirmation timed out. No changes were made.
responses.reset: Review/process role access has been reset. Only admins are currently allowed.

purgeMember.temporaryMemberKickMessage:
Due to {cleanGuildName} policies, we remove temporary members after {hoursToExpire} hour(s).

This might seem like bad news, but worry not citizen! You have not been BANNED, only kicked. If you decide to rejoin {cleanGuildName} as a full member, you are more than welcome to do so — just make sure to submit a proper application when you return.

If you choose to join, we’ll be excited to have you! If not, fly safe and we’ll see you in the 'verse!

-Dreadnought Industries Management

readOnly.maintenance: Bot is in read-only mode for maintenance. Commands are temporarily disabled.
